title: Website launch & plugin catalog
items: Launched openwpclub.com with full plugin catalog
Added dark mode support and theme toggle
Plugin pages with live GitHub data (stars, forks, README)
Blog with tag-based filtering
Contributors page with live GitHub data
SEO optimizations: sitemap, structured data, Open Graph
Accessibility: skip-to-content, focus indicators, semantic HTML

title: Community & content expansion
items: Added FAQ page with structured data for rich results
Added Privacy Policy page
Added Changelog page
Added breadcrumb navigation to all inner pages
Added social sharing buttons to blog posts
Added robots.txt for better crawling
Added Twitter/X to footer social links
Enabled stats section on homepage
Added rel="me" social verification links
Added Back to Top button for long pages
Added print-friendly styles
Security headers, OG image, apple-touch-icon improvements
Reusable icon components and Logo component
Plugin search with URL state sync and topic filtering
Blog next/prev navigation and RSS button
Language color indicators on plugin cards
